title: Relocating a Specialty Coffee Lab: Safely Calibrating and Transporting Sample Roasters and Moisture Meters
excerpt: Relocate specialty coffee lab: transport sample roasters moisture meters calibration, coffee equipment commercial moving Addis Ababa guide.
content:
Relocating a specialty coffee lab: safely calibrating and transporting sample roasters and moisture meters

Specialty coffee lab precision lives in sample roaster calibration and moisture meter accuracy—bump transit drifts profile, loses crop year documentation trust. Relocation sequences cool-down, gas disconnect certified, instrument cases, and recalibration appointment destination before first cupping.

This guide relocates coffee labs transporting sample roasters and moisture meters safely.

Sample roaster protocol

  • Full cool-down before wrap—fire risk.
  • Gas disconnect licensed if applicable.
  • Drum lock transport position manual.
  • Control panel blanket face.
  • Upright orientation; vibration pad truck nest.

Moisture meters and lab gear

Hard case each; calibration standard beans bag hand-carry; cupping bowls cell box; grinder burr lock; green sample sealed labeled not contaminate.

Green coffee inventory

Breathable bags; moisture log; fumigation certificate if export context; separate from chemical cleaning supplies.

Destination recommission

Ventilation hood test; calibration vendor schedule; roast trial batch discard; update cupping lab layout workflow.

Active Movers coffee lab commercial

Cool-down verification checklist; instrument upright zone; roaster specialist referral network.

Conclusion

Coffee lab relocation preserves cupping integrity when roasters cool cased and meters recalibrated—specialty precision moves deliberate not rushed hot drum.
author: Active Movers Team
